sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51667" key="ka/qalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάθᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἅλς Α</etym>) <sense id="n51667.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">full of salt, over-salted</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:17:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.13</biblScope> </bibl>: comically, of the cook, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:1:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
